description: A long-time season ticket holder wants to upgrade their seats to a better location for the next season.

nodes.task_description: Look up the customer's account and their current seat location.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the customer's account and current seats.

nodes.task_description: Check the seat upgrade availability list for the upcoming season.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds several better seat locations that are available.

nodes.task_description: Present the available upgrade options and the difference in price to the customer.

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly communicates the new seat locations and the additional cost.

nodes.task_description: Process the seat upgrade and generate the new invoice for the season tickets.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully updates the customer's seats and invoice.
